data.title: United Airlines Stock Slips As Softer 2026 Outlook Overshadows Q1 Earnings Beat
data.description: United Airlines Holdings Inc recently released their first-quarter financial results, with revenue standing at $14.61 billion, surpassing the expected $14.34 billion. The company also reported adjusted earnings of $1.19 per share, exceeding analyst forecasts of $1.10 per share. Total operating revenue saw a 10.6% increase compared to the previous year. Revenue from Premium Cabin flights rose by 14%, Basic Economy by 7%, and Loyalty by 13%, while Cargo revenue declined by 1.6%. Capacity increased by 3.4% year-over-year. The stock for United Airlines Holdings is currently facing resistance in the market.
FS Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter Net Income of $7.8 Million or $1.02 Per Diluted Share and Declares 53rd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend

data.title: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notice Regarding Delinquent Filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K
data.description: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: CHARU), based in Wilmington, DE, received notification from Nasdaq regarding non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) for failing to timely file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This could impact the Company's listing on The Nasdaq Global Market but currently does not affect trading of its securities. The Company, a Cayman Islands exempted entity, disclosed this information to the public on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical Delivers Q1 Double Beat: ISRG Earnings Highlights
data.description: Intuitive Surgical Inc (NASDAQ: ISRG) released its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday after the market closed. The company reported revenue of $2.77 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $2.62 billion. Additionally, adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.50 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $2.10 per share. Total revenue saw a 23% increase year-over-year, attributed to higher procedure volume, more da Vinci system placements, and growth in the da Vinci and Ion system installed base. Instruments and accessories revenue rose to $1.69 billion from $1.37 billion in the previous year's quarter. Intuitive Surgical shares are currently in the spotlight and the market is closely watching their trajectory.

data.title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Second Quarter Dividends
data.description: Buffalo-based M&T Bank Corporation has recently disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $1.50 per share for its common stock. Shareholders as of record on June 1 will receive the dividend on June 30, 2026. M&T, listed on the NYSE under MTB, made this announcement on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Company now has $62B in Bitcoin; reveals largest BTC purchases. How Strategy acquired its record-breaking stash explained.
data.description: An overview of Michael Saylor's company's accumulation of Bitcoin and the strategies behind its record-breaking growth.

data.title: GitLab Collaborates with AWS to Bring Agentic DevSecOps to Enterprise Teams Using Their Existing Amazon Bedrock Accounts and Spend
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. unveiled an enhanced partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) for increased collaboration. This integration allows customers to utilize GitLab Duo Agent Platform inference alongside Amazon Bedrock, enabling more efficient DevSecOps through Amazon Bedrock models, IAM policies, and AWS spending commitments. With AI agents producing additional code, merge requests, and pipeline activity, enterprises can benefit from streamlined operations and governance.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Stock Slips After Q1 Report: Here's Why
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) released their first-quarter financial results, falling short of revenue expectations. The company reported earnings of 60 cents per share, meeting analyst predictions. However, quarterly revenue was $1.67 billion, missing the estimated $1.71 billion by 2.25%. In comparison to the same period last year, the following highlights were noted: customer accounts rose by 31% to 4.75 million, customer equity increased by 38% to $789.4 billion, and total DARTs increased by 24% to 4.37 million. For full details, refer to the article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Five Years in the Making: Alex & Mor: A Love Odyssey Premieres Exclusively on Mometu April 24
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Mometu, a streaming service that supports independent and underrepresented films, revealed the exclusive debut of "Alex & Mor: A Love Odyssey," the first feature film by director Tim Glover. This film will only be accessible on the platform and caters to audiences interested in niche cinema.

data.title: Bright Horizons Family Solutions Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Bright Horizons Family Solutions Inc., listed on NYSE as BFAM, is set to announce its Q1 2026 results on May 5, 2026, post the stock market closure. The company will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day for investors and analysts to delve into the quarterly performance, revised business prospects, strategy, and outcomes. To tune into the call, interested individuals can dial 1-844-53.

Iran’s position will be officially announced at a later date.
- Tasnim

data.title: Intuitive Announces First Quarter Earnings
data.description: On April 21, 2026, based in Sunnyvale, California, Intuitive, a prominent company (Nasdaq: ISRG) specializing in innovative solutions for minimally invasive procedures and the forefront of robotic-assisted surgery, disclosed their financial performance for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Capital One Misses Q1 Estimates — Stock Drops
data.description: Capital One Financial Corp (COF) released its first-quarter earnings report, falling short of analyst predictions for both revenue and earnings per share. The company reported earnings of $4.42 per share, below the expected $4.55. Quarterly revenue totaled $15.23 billion, missing the estimated $15.36 billion by 0.83%. In comparison to the previous year's quarter, total net revenue dipped by 2% to $15.2 billion, while total non-interest expense decreased by 9% to $8.5 billion. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Booking Holdings Inc. to Present at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - On April 21, 2026, Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) declared that their Chief Financial Officer, Ewout Steenbergen, will engage in a fireside conversation at the Barclays 18th Annual Americas Select Conference in London. The session is scheduled for May 5th at 10:45 am CET.

data.title: SOLOWIN HOLDINGS Expects Revenue in the Range of $27 Million to $29 Million, Approximately 10x Year-over-Year Growth for the Fiscal Year Ended March 31, 2026 Based on Preliminary Unaudited Results
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Hong Kong-based Solowin Holdings (Nasdaq: AXG) revealed preliminary unaudited financial results for the fiscal year ending on March 31. Solowin, a prominent financial technology company connecting traditional and digital assets, shared key information about its performance during that period.

data.title: FS Bancorp, Inc. Reports First Quarter Net Income of $7.8 Million or $1.02 Per Diluted Share and Declares 53rd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Mountlake Terrace, Washington, on April 21, 2026: FS Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSBW), the parent company of 1st Security Bank of Washington, disclosed that their net income for the first quarter of 2026 amounted to $7.8 million, translating to $1.02 per diluted share. This figure saw a slight decline from the preceding quarter where it stood at $8.4 million, or $1.10 per diluted share, and a marginal drop from $8.0 million, or $1.01 per diluted share, during the same period last year. The pre-tax income for Q1 2026 was reported as $9.9 million, indicating a $440,000 increase (4.6%) from the $9.5 million registered in Q1 2025. The variance in net income between the two quarters is primarily attributed to a higher effective income tax rate.

data.title: Dana to Pay Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: In Maumee, Ohio, on April 21, 2026, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) disclosed that their board of directors approved a common stock dividend. The board sanctioned a quarterly dividend worth $0.12 per share, to be distributed on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of Dana common stock recorded as of May 8...

data.title: Ascendis Announces Redemption of All $575 Million of Outstanding 2.25% Convertible Senior Notes Due 2028
data.description: Ascendis Pharma A/S (Nasdaq: ASND) made an announcement today in Copenhagen, Denmark, stating its decision to call all $575.0 million aggregate principal amount of its outstanding 2.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 for redemption on May 6, 2026. The notes can be identified through CUSIP No. 04351P AD3 / ISIN No. US04351PAD33. This redemption action is based on Ascendis' redemption right as outlined in Section 4.03(B) of the indenture entered into on March 29, 2022, between Ascendis and U.S. Bank Trust Company, National Association, as trustee. The trigger for this redemption right was met as the last reported sale price per ordinary share surpassed 130% of the conversion price for at least 20 trading days within the 30 consecutive trading day period ending on April 21, 2026.

data.title: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation Issues Correction to Press Release Dated April 21, 2026
data.description: On April 21, 2026 in Winnemucca, Nevada, Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) provided a correction to its previous press release regarding engaging an engineering firm to evaluate underground mining options. The Company issued the correction to clarify the information contained in the earlier announcement.

data.title: STERIS to Host a Conference Call for Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on May 12, 2026
data.description: In Dublin, Ireland on April 21, 2026, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) revealed plans to conduct a conference call to review its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter and full-year performance at 9:00 a.m. ET on May 12, 2026. Interested parties can participate in the live call via www.steris-ir.com or by phone at 1-833-535-2199 in the US or 1-412-902-6776 internationally, requesting access to the STERIS plc conference call.
